chapter_loop: Template Node -> Question -> Input Contract -> Evidence Acquisition -> Processing -> Output Draft -> Evidence Sufficiency Review -> Red Team Argument -> Revised Conclusion -> Review Gates -> Human Decision Stop

sorftime_keyword_trend_raw_v7.period: 2024-04 to 2026-03 search volume; 2024-05 to 2026-04 recommended CPC

sorftime_keyword_detail_live_2026_04_30.read: The keyword is semantically polluted; top natural products include book lights, night lights, Hatch, Momcozy and other adjacent products.
Cleaner Amazon entry keyword than wake up light; top products span Echo Spot, DreamSky, Hatch, Sharp and Odokee-type hybrid products.
Smaller search volume but strong adjacent battlefield; results are dominated by sound machines, alarm clocks and hybrid bedside devices.

sorftime_walmart_live_2026_04_30.note: Earlier cached v4 evidence had 20260422 data, but current live call returned no related data, so v8 treats it as weaker than sunrise alarm clock.

sorftime_product_ranking_live_2026_04_30.read: Repeated page 1 exposure during 2026-04-17 to 2026-04-29; latest observations include page 1 positions #2, #8 and #11.
Visible but more volatile across page 1 and page 2 during 2026-04-24 to 2026-04-29.
Stable page 1 exposure in late March and April, often page 1 positions #3-#6.
Exposure exists but is less stable, moving across page 1/page 2/page 3.

frozen_prior_sellersprite_evidence.used_because: SellerSprite live asin_detail/google_trend returned unauthorized in v8, so v8 reuses already frozen evidence instead of inventing new values.

section_status.name: 全球主要市场大盘
section_status.reason: Sleep tech macro proxy collected, but exact wake-up-light TAM, region split, supply-chain B-side data and customs data are not collected.

section_status.name: 市场发展趋势
section_status.reason: Amazon station 24-month keyword trend collected; Google Trends route returned unauthorized.

section_status.name: 市场生命周期
section_status.reason: Lifecycle is inferred from keyword decline, product count, review moat, brand structure and new-product evidence.

section_status.name: 亚马逊关键词搜索趋势
section_status.reason: Sorftime 24-month search volume, rank and CPC series collected and annual MoM/YoY calculated.

section_status.name: 亚马逊市场容量&趋势
section_status.reason: Keyword-level and representative ASIN data collected; full category annual sales curve remains not_collected.

section_status.name: 品牌集中度
section_status.reason: Sorftime top5 brand/seller shares collected for three keywords, but exact full-category brand count and cleaned N/A attribution remain not_collected.

section_status.name: 市场新品趋势
section_status.reason: Representative new/hybrid ASINs and ranking trends collected; launch-date distribution and full new-ASIN table remain not_collected.

section_status.name: 其他渠道市场机会
section_status.reason: Walmart live keyword detail and public retail anchors collected; Target/HomeDepot/Lowe's structured Top1000 remains not_collected.

zero_hallucination_notes: Exact wake-up-light global TAM is not collected.
Google Trends is not collected because SellerSprite google_trend returned ERROR_UNAUTHORIZED.
Amazon full category annual sales curve is not collected.
SellerSprite live asin_detail is not collected because current calls returned ERROR_UNAUTHORIZED.
Any lifecycle conclusion is labelled as inference from collected facts.
Any macro sleep-tech figure is treated as adjacent proxy, not direct wake-up-light market size.
